title: CodeGrind AI Assistant Evolution: From Guidance to Guided Practice
summary: Show how CodeGrind’s AI assistant has evolved to provide multi-model guidance, real-time feedback, and seamless integration with Google Sign-In, enhancing DSA practice without leaving the platform.
core_message: CodeGrind now offers an enhanced AI assistant experience with Azure OpenAI GPT-4o support, model switching, persistent chat, and tighter integration with authentication flows, delivering smarter, more contextual guidance during DSA practice in a single, cohesive environment.
cta: Try the new AI-assisted problem-solving flow in CodeGrind and sign in with Google to experience seamless progress tracking.
visual_brief: A short, 45-60 second walkthrough video: opening with the CodeGrind problem editor, AI chat panel on the side, quick model-switch UI, and a before/after scenario showing AI guidance improving a sample LeetCode-style problem. End with a close-up of Google sign-in flow and a progress dashboard.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

linkedin.text: CodeGrind evolves AI-assisted practice with Azure OpenAI GPT-4o support, model switching, persistent chat, and tighter Google Sign-In integration. This 45–60 second visual walkthrough highlights an enhanced problem editor, AI chat, and a progress dashboard that helps you practice DSA in one cohesive environment. Try the new AI-assisted flow and sign in to track progress: https://codegrind.online
